name: The Agent of Entropy - Uranus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>行</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ウラヌス
desc: If "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn: You can send 1 "The Agent" monster from your Deck to the GY, and if you do, this card's Level becomes the Level of the monster sent to the GY by this effect.
mnst_eff: If "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn: You can send 1 "The Agent" monster from your Deck to the GY, and if you do, this card's Level becomes the Level of the monster sent to the GY by this effect.
eff: If "The Sanctuary in the Sky" is on the field, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). Once per turn: You can send 1 "The Agent" monster from your Deck to the GY, and if you do, this card's Level becomes the Level of the monster sent to the GY by this effect.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
